title: Linux At Job Scheduled
description: Detects scheduling of at jobs for deferred command execution. Attackers use at jobs for timed persistence or delayed payload execution.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'at') or ('Process Name' = 'batch'))
